name: Find My
description: macOS-only. Query Find My friend/device locations, list devices, and ring phones by driving FindMy.app via screen capture and Vision OCR. Supports 41 macOS display languages and device aliases. Shells out to the `findmy` binary. Requires Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions.

cliPath.description: Path to the findmy binary. Defaults to PATH lookup.

cliPath.label: CLI Path
cliPath.help: Path or command name for the findmy binary. Defaults to finding it on PATH (typically /opt/homebrew/bin/findmy after `brew install omarshahine/tap/findmy-cli`).
